name: Milange of the Lily Family and Andouille Sausage Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Andouille sausage, cut into 1-inch pieces
2 cups cubed French bread, fried in olive oil until golden
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the olive oil and flour. Stirring constantly, cook for about 10 minutes to form a blond roux.
2. Add the onions (yellow, white, and red) and cook until golden, about 10 minutes.
3. Add the Andouille sausage, shallots, garlic, leeks, bay leaves, and thyme. Season with salt, pepper, and cayenne pepper.
4. Stir in the chicken stock and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to maintain a simmer.
5. Simmer the soup for about 1 hour, skimming occasionally to remove any fat that rises to the surface.
6. Remove the bay leaves from the soup.
7. Stir in the grated Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese and chopped green onions.
8. Ladle the soup into shallow bowls.
9. Garnish with croutons, remaining grated Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese, and parsley.
Yield: 8 servings
